contradictions.summary: Support suggested the dashboard might be back by Monday, but the order form states support targets are best-effort and not guaranteed resolution times.

claimA.text: I expect we can get the dashboard back by Monday, May 25 if Product confirms the aggregation fix.

claimB.text: Support targets are commercially reasonable efforts and are not guaranteed resolution times.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Use escalation and resolution-plan wording, not guaranteed SLA wording, until a signed amendment exists.

contradictions.summary: Customer-facing follow-up promises a named owner by Monday, while internal Slack says no product owner is assigned yet.

claimA.text: We’ve escalated the routing dashboard issue and will share a confirmed resolution plan and owner by Monday.

claimB.text: No product owner assigned yet for the routing dashboard fix.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Assign Product owner before Monday update or explicitly state owner assignment is pending.
